data.title: TRX price may hit $0.35 by February as technical momentum strengthens, with RSI at 64 and resistance at $0.32.
data.description: TRON is exhibiting neutral to slightly bullish signals, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at 64. The cryptocurrency is facing resistance at the $0.32 mark. Analysis of technical patterns indicates a possible upcoming movement towards the range of $0.32 to $0.35 within the next 30 days if certain critical levels are breached.

data.title: Litecoin at $70.53 eyes $80-85 rebound in Feb. RSI at 33.90 signals oversold bounce. Support at $68.50 crucial.
data.description: The current trading price of Litecoin stands at $70.53, accompanied by an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 33.90, indicating a potential upcoming rebound. Analysis of the technical aspects of the market indicates a resistance zone of $80-85 within the next 3-4 weeks, provided that the support level of $68.50 remains intact. This data suggests a likelihood of a positive price movement in the near future.

data.title: Ecolab and CDP introduce Water Use Efficiency Index for companies to measure/compare/ improve water performance at Davos.
data.description: Ecolab Inc. and CDP have unveiled a new alliance in St. Paul, Minn., to introduce the Water Use Efficiency Index. This strategic partnership aims to provide companies with a tool to assess, benchmark, and enhance operational water efficiency. The Index was revealed at the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos and will feature industry-specific metrics for top-tier water efficiency and tailored goals. This initiative equips corporate executives with a comprehensive understanding of their water consumption practices for improved sustainability.

data.title: Virgin Media O2, NEC, and Netcracker to discuss telco innovation at TM Forum Tokyo event, focusing on operator benefits.
data.description: A discussion will be held in Waltham, Massachusetts involving Netcracker, its parent company NEC, and customer Virgin Media O2. The focus will be on outlining the advantages that operators stand to gain from the upcoming wave of telecommunications innovations.

data.title: ATOM price expected to reach $2.75-$2.80 by January 2026, with short-term target at $2.75 and critical support at $2.40.
data.description: Summary of ATOM Price Prediction: In the short term, the target price within one week is $2.75. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast falls within the range of $2.45 to $2.80 over the course of a month. To indicate a bullish breakout, the price needs to surpass $2.67. On the other hand, a critical support level is identified at $2.40. This information is vital for crypto analysts and traders assessing ATOM's potential movement in the market.

data.title: AI tool forcedlabor.ai launched by Exiger at Davos to help companies find forced labor in supply chains. Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: Exiger, a prominent supply chain AI company and the primary supplier of supply chain technology to the U.S. Government, introduced forcedlabor.ai at the World Economic Forum's Annual Meeting in Davos on January 20, 2026. This new platform is aimed at tackling forced labor issues.

data.title: DeFi project Pendle updates governance token due to low adoption, transitioning from vePENDLE to sPENDLE for increased flexibility.
data.description: This month, Pendle plans to gradually discontinue its governance token vePENDLE and introduce sPENDLE as a replacement in order to enhance flexibility and drive adoption.

data.title: Bitcoin stays steady at $92K as investors view the drop as 'buy the dip' chance after leverage issues and optimism reset. Key is if bulls seize opportunity.
data.description: The recent decline in Bitcoin's value to $92,000 was attributed to the elimination of leverage and a correction in overconfident investor sentiment. The focus now lies on whether optimistic buyers will take advantage of this price drop by purchasing more Bitcoin.

data.title: Analysts foresee BCH hitting $720-$750 by February 2026, currently at $579 (-1.7% daily), with potential 24-29% upside.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin Cash stands at $579, experiencing a 1.7% decrease in value over the day. Despite the bearish trend, various analysts anticipate the price to reach between $720 and $750 in the next 30 days. This projection indicates a potential upside of 24-29% from the current levels.

data.title: WISeKey, WISeSat.Space, and SEALSQ to discuss "Trust and Convergence 2026: The Year of Quantum Security" at Davos.
data.description: WISeKey, WISeSat.Space, and SEALSQ will be hosting discussions on "Trust and Convergence 2026: The Year of Quantum Security" during the prominent Davos gathering. This event will bring together industry leaders, experts, and professionals to explore the implications and possibilities of quantum security in the upcoming year. The discussions will cover various topics related to cybersecurity, encryption, and emerging technologies. The event aims to address the importance of trust and convergence in the digital landscape, emphasizing the need for secure and resilient systems. This initiative highlights the growing significance of quantum security in safeguarding data and information. Attendees can expect engaging dialogues and insights on shaping the future of cybersecurity.
Macron says to Trump that the two leaders can accomplish significant progress on Iran.

data.title: ROHM unveils 100V power MOSFET RS7P200BM in 5x6mm package, ideal for AI servers with 48V power, leading SOA performance.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, on January 20, 2026, ROHM Co., Ltd. announced the development of the RS7P200BM, a 100V power MOSFET housed in a compact 5060-size package measuring 5.0mm x 6.0mm. This innovation sets a new industry benchmark for safe operating area (SOA) performance. The MOSFET is specifically tailored for hot-swap circuits within AI servers that utilize 48V power systems.

data.title: Signaloid achieves SOC 2 Type II attestation, offering diverse computing solutions. Reported on Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: In Cambridge, England, on January 20, 2026, Signaloid revealed news about their services on PRNewswire. The company, available at signaloid.com, specializes in offering hardware and cloud-based computing solutions. They cater to various tasks such as quantitative finance calculations, engineering simulations, and Bayesian AI models. The company announced...

data.title: Renault Group reports third consecutive year of growth, fueled by international sales and electrification.
data.description: The Renault Group and its affiliated brands have experienced a third consecutive year of growth, fueled by a surge in international sales and a focus on electrification. This success is marked by a significant increase in overall sales figures, with a strong emphasis on expanding market presence globally. The group's commitment to electrification has also played a key role in this achievement, contributing to the growth in sales of electric vehicles. This positive trend underscores the continued success of the Renault Group in achieving its strategic objectives and staying competitive in the evolving automotive industry landscape.

data.title: Arcadis finalizes share buyback program, concludes transactions as planned.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in City X. The local health department confirmed that there have been 500 new cases in the past week, bringing the total number of cases in the city to 2000. This spike in cases has prompted authorities to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and restrictions on social gatherings. The hospitals in the city are reportedly overwhelmed, with 80% of the intensive care beds currently occupied by COVID-19 patients. Officials are urging residents to adhere to the guidelines and precautions to help contain the spread of the virus.

data.title: Coinbase and Circle are helping Bermuda become world's first 'on-chain economy'; aiming to revamp economy with digital assets, education, and tools.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) has announced support for Bermuda's goal to become the world's first "fully on-chain national economy." The initiative, revealed at the World Economic Forum in Davos, involves collaboration with Circle Internet Group Inc. (NYSE: CRCL) to utilize digital asset infrastructure and enterprise tools in transforming the nation's economy. The plan includes nationwide digital finance education and technical onboarding. Bermuda Premier E. David Burt expressed gratitude for the support from Coinbase and Circle, while Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong voiced excitement for the project, emphasizing the potential of open financial systems in driving economic freedom. This groundbreaking effort signifies a significant move towards establishing a digital finance ecosystem at a national level.
